build.beforeDevCommand: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root=(Get-Location).Path; while($root -and -not (Test-Path (Join-Path $root 'package.json'))){ $parent=Split-Path $root -Parent; if($parent -eq $root){$root=$null}else{$root=$parent} }; if(-not $root){ throw 'repo root not found' }; pnpm --dir $root dev:web"
build.beforeBuildCommand: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root=(Get-Location).Path; while($root -and -not (Test-Path (Join-Path $root 'package.json'))){ $parent=Split-Path $root -Parent; if($parent -eq $root){$root=$null}else{$root=$parent} }; if(-not $root){ throw 'repo root not found' }; pnpm --dir $root build:web; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File (Join-Path $root 'scripts\step13\prepare-windows-node-sidecar.ps1') -RepoRoot $root"
